abort.already_linked: This HomeBox item is already linked.
abort.hb_item_not_available: This HomeBox item is no longer available for linking.
abort.no_ha_devices: No Home Assistant devices available for linking.
abort.no_unlinked_ha_devices: No unlinked Home Assistant devices are available.
abort.no_unlinked_hb_items: No unlinked HomeBox items with the Home Assistant tag were found.

error.invalid_auth_homebox: Login failed. Verify the HomeBox URL and port (often :7745 or Docker-mapped :3100), and confirm the email address/password are correct for HomeBox local login.
error.create_hb_item_failed: Failed to create and link the HomeBox item. Check logs and try again.
error.image_download_failed: Failed to download the image URL.
error.image_not_image: The image URL did not return an image content type.
error.image_too_large: The image is too large (maximum 10 MB).
error.invalid_image_url: Image URL must be a valid http(s) URL.
error.link_conflict: Cannot create link because this Home Assistant device or HomeBox item is already linked.
error.unlink_conflict: Cannot remove link because the selected link no longer matches.

data_description.area: Select an existing Home Assistant room to suggest for the HomeBox device
data_description.host: URL or hostname of your HomeBox instance. Common ports are 7745 (default) or 3100 (common Docker mapping), for example: http://homebox.local:3100
data_description.name: Device name shown in Home Assistant (default: HomeBox)
data_description.username: Email address of your HomeBox account
